phase: Phase 4 — Admin-paneel LIVE: user-CRUD + storage-stats + audit-log-viewer + MFA-backup-codes (bcrypt-hashed, single-use) + admin-rescue (disable-MFA + send-magic-link) + /auth/me + CLI promote-admin
kdf_in_use: AES-KDF (KDBX-spec-conform). Argon2id-bridge staat klaar; full re-enable verschoven naar v0.0.5+ na KeePassXC-CLI oracle-test in Fase 5.

mfa.magic_link: 32-byte urlsafe token, 10 min, single-use via Gmail SMTP_SSL
mfa.secret_at_rest: AES-GCM-encrypted (12-byte nonce + ciphertext + tag) met HORSESAFE_TOTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY

next_version_planned: 0.0.5-Shamir (Phase 5 — import/export KDBX/Bitwarden/CSV/XLSX + KeePassXC-CLI roundtrip-oracle + Argon2id re-enable evaluatie)
